# References {.unnumbered}

Fisher, S. (2024). *The Emotional Impact of Heartbreak: Understanding and Healing from Relationship Loss*. Wellness Publishing.

Herbert, C. (2024). *Healing from Domestic Violence: A Journey to Wholeness*. Courage Press.

Johnson, E. (2024). *From Broken to Whole: Reclaiming Your Identity After Heartbreak*. Empowerment Books.

Miller, A. (2023). *The Science of Grief and Healing: A Psychological Approach*. Academic Press.

Roberts, L., & Chen, J. (2023). Self-Compassion as a Pathway to Healing: Interventions for Emotional Wounds. *Journal of Psychology and Wellbeing, 12*(4), 112–130.

Thompson, R. (2023). Rebuilding Self-Esteem After Relationship Loss: Evidence-Based Approaches. *Mental Health Review, 18*(2), 45–60.

Williams, T. (2024). *Setting Boundaries: Protecting Your Peace After Emotional Trauma*. Healing Arts Publishing.

Brooks, M. (2023). Rebuilding Trust After Betrayal: A Guide for Survivors. *Journal of Trauma and Recovery, 9*(1), 23–45.
